creator: mutoh@openedu.org
text:
Update japanese/seaside version from 070105 to 070930.

Fix: Please apply patch below:



--
Takeshi MUTOH	<mutoh@openedu.org>--or2TZcd3R754vBQoDkoqmVS1CBqRhmV701KDvLrd2GlDE2Zp
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ruN /usr/ports/japanese/seaside/Makefile ./Makefile
--- /usr/ports/japanese/seaside/Makefile	2007-05-20 05:12:16.000000000 +0900
+++ ./Makefile	2007-10-03 16:44:14.000000000 +0900
@@ -6,13 +6,11 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	seaside
-PORTVERSION=	070105
-PORTREVISION=	1
+DISTVERSION=	070930-sq38
 CATEGORIES=	japanese lang
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://swikis.ddo.jp/SeasideJ/
-DISTNAME=	Seaside-JPatched${PORTVERSION}
-# DISTFILES=	Seaside-JPatched${PORTVERSION}.zip
-EXTRACT_ONLY=	Seaside-JPatched${PORTVERSION}.zip
+DISTNAME=	Seaside-JPatched${DISTVERSION}
+EXTRACT_ONLY=	Seaside-JPatched${DISTVERSION}.zip
 
 MAINTAINER=	mutoh@openedu.org
 COMMENT=	Seaside: squeak based WWW application framework with Japanized patch
@@ -24,8 +22,8 @@
 
 DIST_SUBDIR=	squeak
 
-FILES_TO_GZIP=	Seaside-JPatched070105.image \
-		Seaside-JPatched070105.changes
+FILES_TO_GZIP=	Seaside-JPatched20${DISTVERSION}.image \
+		Seaside-JPatched20${DISTVERSION}.changes
 
 PLIST_SUB=	DATADIR=share/squeak
 post-extract:
diff -ruN /usr/ports/japanese/seaside/distinfo ./distinfo
--- /usr/ports/japanese/seaside/distinfo	2007-01-30 19:36:31.000000000 +0900
+++ ./distinfo	2007-10-03 15:43:32.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (squeak/Seaside-JPatched070105.zip) = a2462fa674bc90fcabfdadf3b6c2e617
-SHA256 (squeak/Seaside-JPatched070105.zip) = b3701d0c5d31228184046b70a3b86ce5d63f192f47050799f04a2a65b63e2855
-SIZE (squeak/Seaside-JPatched070105.zip) = 17863819
+MD5 (squeak/Seaside-JPatched070930-sq38.zip) = 712768394ebec131a3aad157a39292b8
+SHA256 (squeak/Seaside-JPatched070930-sq38.zip) = a4ac10c2f88085d72501bdc63a56e46448096e042f6d269b9c9f2401b23d2da9
+SIZE (squeak/Seaside-JPatched070930-sq38.zip) = 18094719
diff -ruN /usr/ports/japanese/seaside/pkg-plist ./pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/japanese/seaside/pkg-plist	2007-01-30 19:36:31.000000000 +0900
+++ ./pkg-plist	2007-10-03 15:49:04.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-%%DATADIR%%/Seaside-JPatched070105.image.gz
-%%DATADIR%%/Seaside-JPatched070105.changes.gz
+%%DATADIR%%/Seaside-JPatched20070930-sq38.image.gz
+%%DATADIR%%/Seaside-JPatched20070930-sq38.changes.gz
